extensionDescription.message: Meafaigaluega fa'atusatusaga ese'ese mama mama tuimotu mo tusitusiga ma fa'ailoga.
extensionDescription.description: Description shown in the Chrome Web Store

headerSubtitle.message: Faatusatusa tusitusiga, code, JSON, ma isi mea - tuusao

placeholderOriginal.message: Fa'apipi'i le ulua'i tusitusiga po'o le fa'ailoga iinei...

placeholderModified.message: Fa'apipi'i tusitusiga po'o fa'ailoga ua suia iinei...

emptyStateBody.message: Fa'apipi'i tusitusiga i totonu o paneli e lua ma kiliki Fa'atusatusa - pe lolomi Ctrl + Enter

identicalBody.message: E leai se eseesega na maua i le va o mea e lua.

errorLargeInput.message: E matua tele lava mea e fai. E ono alu sina taimi le eseesega...

errorBothEmpty.message: Fa'amolemole fa'apipi'i mea i totonu o paneta uma e lua a'o le'i fa'atusatusa.

errorOneEmpty.message: E leai se isi laulau. Fa'amolemole tu'u mai mea o lo'o i totonu o laulau e lua.

formatJSONError.message: JSON le aoga i se tasi po'o paneli uma e lua.
